items.title: User Endpoint Devices
items.description: Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices shall be protected.

items.title: Information Access Restriction
items.description: Access to information and other associated assets shall be restricted in accordance with the established topic-specific policy on access control.

items.title: Secure Authentication
items.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be established and implemented based on information access restrictions and the topic-specific policy on access control.

items.title: Protection Against Malware
items.description: Protection against malware shall be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.

items.title: Configuration Management
items.description: Configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks shall be established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.

items.title: Data Leakage Prevention
items.description: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.

items.title: Monitoring Activities
items.description: Networks, systems and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour and appropriate actions taken to evaluate potential information security events.

items.title: Networks Security
items.description: Networks and network devices shall be secured, managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.

items.title: Use of Cryptography
items.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, shall be defined and implemented.

items.title: Secure Development Life Cycle
items.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be established and applied.

items.title: Secure Coding
items.description: Secure coding principles shall be applied to software development.
